capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise track all content on mobiles as part of the content management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise track all content on mobiles as part of the content management service?

questions.prompt: Is the content management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the content management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented enterprise-wide policy for content management?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized, documented enterprise-wide policy for content management?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review the content management policy for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise review the content management policy for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a system or MDM capable of monitoring and managing downloadable content on mobiles at enterprise level?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a system or MDM capable of monitoring and managing downloadable content on mobiles at enterprise level?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise downloadable content monitoring and management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a system or MDM capable of distributing select content on mobiles at enterprise level?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a system or MDM capable of distributing select content on mobiles at enterprise level?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have software or MDM that is capable of managing virtual spaces or workspaces on corporate-owned personal mobiles?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have software or MDM that is capable of managing virtual spaces or workspaces on corporate-owned personal mobiles?
questions.evaluation_focus: Virtual workspace management on corporate-owned personal mobiles

questions.prompt: Is the process of provisioning virtual spaces on mobile phones automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the process of provisioning virtual spaces on mobile phones automated?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have software or MDM capable of upgrading the firmware of a mobile device remotely?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have software or MDM capable of upgrading the firmware of a mobile device remotely?

questions.prompt: Can the enterprise automatically trigger a mobile upgrade?
questions.intent: Evaluate can the enterprise automatically trigger a mobile upgrade?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process of maintaining golden images for assets, especially endpoints?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized documented process of maintaining golden images for assets, especially endpoints?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy golden-image-based assets enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise deploy golden-image-based assets enterprise-wide?

questions.prompt: Are assets deployed with golden images automatically during provisioning?
questions.intent: Evaluate are assets deployed with golden images automatically during provisioning?

questions.prompt: Are golden images frequently reviewed to enhance the security posture of the image itself?
questions.intent: Evaluate are golden images frequently reviewed to enhance the security posture of the image itself?
